message:
fix: Script library improvements

- autofix.sh: Autofix functionality updates
- doctor_fix.sh: Doctor fix script improvements
- export-config.sh: Config export enhancements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -69,6 +69,10 @@ while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
             shift
             ;;
         --output)
+            if [[ -z "${2:-}" || "$2" == -* ]]; then
+                log_error "--output requires a file path"
+                exit 1
+            fi
             OUTPUT_FILE="$2"
             shift 2
             ;;
